summary: All 5 critical bug fixes verified. Backend: 13/13 tests pass. Frontend: All features working correctly - Daily Rewards shows Session Active badge with timer and Collect Rewards button, Tap Game shows remaining taps and PRC per tap rate, KYC page shows Take Photo with Camera button, Dashboard shows Recent Activity with icons.
critical_code_review_comments: Mining session persists after starting - session_active: true returned and maintained
Collect Rewards button visible with accumulated PRC amount
Tap Game adds PRC to balance with correct rate (0.01 for free, 0.1 for VIP)
KYC page shows 'Take Photo with Camera' button for document upload
Recent Activity shows comprehensive logs with icons (⛏️ mining, 👆 tap, 🔓 login, 💰 rewards)
updated_files: /app/tests/test_bug_fixes.py - Created comprehensive test suite for bug fixes
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 critical bugs fixed and verified. Test user has active mining session. Backend APIs: /api/user/{uid}, /api/mining/start/{uid}, /api/mining/collect/{uid}, /api/game/tap/{uid}, /api/user/{uid}/recent-activity all working correctly.

bug_1_rewards_session_pauses.verification: Mining session starts and stays active. /api/mining/start returns session_active: true. /api/user/{uid} returns mining_active: true with mining_session_end timestamp.
bug_1_rewards_session_pauses.frontend_verification: Daily Rewards page shows green 'Session Active' badge with timer (23:57:46 remaining)

bug_2_no_collect_prc_button.verification: /api/mining/collect/{uid} endpoint created and working. Returns prc_collected amount.
bug_2_no_collect_prc_button.frontend_verification: Daily Rewards page shows 'Collect Rewards (0.04 PRC)' button with session earnings display

bug_3_tap_game_no_prc.verification: /api/game/tap/{uid} returns prc_earned, remaining_taps, taps_added. Activity logged to activity_logs collection.
bug_3_tap_game_no_prc.frontend_verification: Tap Game page shows 12 Taps Today, 88 Remaining, Free Rate: 0.01 PRC per tap

bug_4_kyc_camera_not_working.verification: ImageCropUpload component has startCamera() function with navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia()
bug_4_kyc_camera_not_working.frontend_verification: KYC page shows 'Take Photo with Camera' button below upload area for both Aadhaar and PAN cards

bug_5_recent_activity_incomplete.verification: /api/user/{uid}/recent-activity endpoint returns comprehensive activity from activity_logs and transactions collections
bug_5_recent_activity_incomplete.frontend_verification: Dashboard shows Recent Activity section with icons: ⛏️ (mining), 👆 (tap game), 🔓 (login), 💰 (rewards)

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/user/{uid}: Returns user data with mining_active, referral_count, prc_balance
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/mining/start/{uid}: Starts mining session, returns session_active: true
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/game/tap/{uid}: Processes taps, returns prc_earned and remaining_taps
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/user/{uid}/recent-activity: Returns comprehensive activity logs with icons

frontend_pages_tested.Dashboard: Recent Activity section with icons and descriptions
frontend_pages_tested.Daily Rewards (/daily-rewards): Session Active badge, timer, Collect Rewards button, session earnings
frontend_pages_tested.Tap Game (/game or Play tab): Taps Today, Remaining, Earned, PRC per tap rate, tap button
frontend_pages_tested.KYC (/kyc): Document selection, upload areas, Take Photo with Camera button
